name: Hack Squat
resistance_profile: Machine squat loading the quads deep with a supported back.
cues: Feet placed for a deep knee bend
execution_steps: Set the shoulder pads and step onto the platform with feet shoulder-width.
Place your back flat against the pad and release the safety handles.
Lower under control into a deep knee bend until you feel a full quad stretch.
Drive through your whole foot to press back up without slamming into lockout.
Re-engage the safeties after your final rep.
good_when: You want heavy quad overload with your back fully supported.
You want to train quads hard without balance or spinal-loading demands.
You want to push close to failure safely on a fixed path.
bad_when: You specifically want free-weight stability and core involvement.
